name: Bar Closing
description: Jazz club closing up for the night

prompts.label: jazz club bartender calling last orders as music fades
prompts.text: jazz club bartender calling last orders as music fades, late-night jazz club, harmon-muted trumpet breath, smoky room intimacy, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, rich, with natural decay

prompts.text: cocktail glasses being collected as house music softens, Blue Note session warmth, walking bass string pluck, last-set-of-the-night mellowness, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, analog warmth, smooth fade out
